This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.

Details
  * Necessary  24
Necessary cookies help make a website usable by enabling basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

Preference cookies enable a website to remember information that changes the way the website behaves or looks, like your preferred language or the region that you are in.
    * [LinkedIn1](https://pqshield.com/products/)[Learn more about this provider![opens in a new window](https://pqshield.com/products/)](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/privacy-policy "Learn more about this provider LinkedIn's privacy policy - opens in a new window")
**lidc** Registers which server-cluster is serving the visitor. This is used in context with load balancing, in order to optimize user experience.

  * Statistics  12
Statistic cookies help website owners to understand how visitors interact with websites by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

About
Cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient.  
  
The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.  
  
This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.  
  
You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.  
  
Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.  
  
Please state your consent ID and date when you contact us regarding your consent.
**Do not sell or share my personal information**
Deny Allow selection Customize Allow all

# UltraPQ-Suite: Mature PQC in Software, FPGA and ASIC
An unparalleled range of IP for many use cases in your PQC migration… from the people who helped write the standards  
.
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/PQS-Security-Suite_August-2025_Products-Security-Suite-Grid-scaled.png)
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/PQS_Fast-Secure-Small-graphic_900px-wide-2-900x533.png)
**Where we truly excel is with PQC that is Ultra Fast, Ultra Small, or Ultra Secure**  
Implementation matters. In fact, fundamentally changing the cryptography behind the scenes mean the way in which it’s implemented is becoming increasingly important. It’s even more acute at the extremes of optimizing for _fast performance_ , _high security_ , or _low footprint_.
PQShield’s deep knowledge (along with our patents, protocols and security techniques) enables us to move way beyond the competition and open source. We can deliver high-quality products to address these optimization problems head-on, allowing you, as a vendor, to reduce time-to-market, and helping you build PQC into greenfield and brownfield products.
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Web_PQMicroLib-Core-900x563.png)
## PQMicroLib-Core
**Highly optimizable baremetal PQC library in as little as 5kb RAM**
**PQMicroLib-Core** is a CAVP-Ready version of PQShield’s CMVP-certified PQCryptoLib-Core, tailored specifically for embedded systems, small footprint solutions, and memory constrained devices. PQMicroLib-Core is an ultra-small library, designed with flexibility and configurability in mind.
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)MORE INFORMATION![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/pqm-cor/)
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Web_PQCryptoLib-Core-900x563.png)
## PQCryptoLib-Core
**Highly configurable SW PQC Library for Classical, PQC and PQ/T Hybrid on Linux, Windows and Mac**
PQCryptoLib-Core is a FIPS 140-3 CMVP Certified / CAVP Compliant general-purpose cryptographic library, designed for a wide variety of applications, with cryptoagility in mind. Configurable by a secure API, PQCryptoLib-Core is optimized for the threat of harvest-now-decrypt-later attacks in a manageable, easy-to-integrate software solution.
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)MORE INFORMATION![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/pqc-cor/)
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Web_PQCryptoLib-SDK-900x563.png)
## PQCryptoLib-SDK
**PQCryptoLib-Core + OpenSSL 3.x Provider for ease of integration**
**PQCryptoLib-SDK** is a plug-and-play tool that helps to transition OpenSSL-based applications to quantum resilience, designed with prototyping and experimentation in mind. It supplies software implementations of PQC algorithms via an OpenSSL provider, including ML-DSA, Falcon, ML-KEM, and hybrid PQ/T schemes for TLS.
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)MORE INFORMATION![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/pqc-sdk/)
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Web_PQPlatform-CoPro-900x563.png)
## PQPlatform-CoPro
**FIPS 140-3 CAVP compliant, compact hardware PQC acceleration**
PQPlatform-CoPro is a highly-flexible cryptographic coprocessor designed to add post-quantum capabilities to an existing security subsystem. It’s a powerful combination of cryptography engines, designed for performance, minimal integration effort and optimization with our world-class side-channel protection.
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)MORE INFORMATION![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/pqp-cop/)
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Web_PQPlatform-TrustSys-900x563.png)
## PQPlatform-TrustSys
**PQC-first RoT with silicon-proven SCA resistance**
Engineered for cryptographic implementation and agility, PQPlatform-TrustSys provides a complete, PQC-focused, Root-of-Trust security solution. With industry-leading, NIST-standardized post-quantum cryptography support (ML-KEM, ML-DSA), plus traditional ECC and RSA cryptographic algorithms, as well as fault-tolerance and side-channel countermeasures, PQPlatform-TrustSys is an **ultra-secure** solution for systems – before, during, and beyond the transition to PQC.
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)MORE INFORMATION![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/pqp-tru/)
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Web_PQPerform-Flare_PQPerform-Flare-900x563.png)
## PQPerform-Flare
**Up to 1M KeyEnc/sec with improved power efficiency**
PQPerform-Flare is a powerful hardware-based FIPS 140-3 CAVP-certified product, designed for high throughput and low latency PQC. It’s a self-contained, ultra-fast hardware product that adds PQC to network HSMs or other infrastructure components where high performance is required. PQPerform-Flare is optimized for TLS, as well as other use cases, and supports ML-DSA (FIPS 204) and ML-KEM (FIPS 203).
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)MORE INFORMATION![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/pqf-flr/)
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Web_PQPerform-Inferno-900x563.png)
## PQPerform-Inferno
**Highly configurable hardware lattice PQC ultra acceleration in AXI4 and PCIe systems**
PQPerform-Inferno is a powerful, scalable hardware solution that’s engineered for unparalleled performance. Building on the architecture of PQPerform-Flare, Inferno integrates multiple instances with intelligent load balancing to achieve breakthrough performance, capable of delivering over 1 million key encapsulations per second.
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)MORE INFORMATION![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/pqf-inf/)
![](https://pqshield.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Web_PQPerform-Flex-900x563.png)
## PQPerform-Flex
**PQPerform-Inferno + RISC-V processor for enhanced cryptoagility**
PQPerform-Flex is a powerful combination of PQPerform-Inferno with a RISC-V processor, providing a complete subsystem, ready for the changing cryptography needs of tomorrow. It supports a range of algorithms including HQC, one of NIST’s future candidates for standardization in 2027. PQPerform-Flex is focused on high-throughput with low latency.
[![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)MORE INFORMATION![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%207%2014%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://pqshield.com/products/pqf-flx/)
**Multi-level security profiles**
As part of our commitment to security provision in different solutions of our products, we’ve developed 4 discrete security levels – **Cloud Grade** , **Edge Grade** , **Lab Grade** and **Government Grade** , which are aligned with NIST, Common Criteria, SESIP and PSA standards, as shown below. These levels are designed to be appropriate for different use cases, and are tested continuously by both PQShield and external labs for certification.
  * Different applications require different threat models
  * PQShield products in 4 security levels to address all use cases
  * Multiple papers currently published on SCA attacks and countermeasures for PQC. All our papers are available from our [Publications](https://pqshield.com/publications/) section.

  
| Grade  | SCA  | FIA  | FIPS 140-3 CMVP  | Common Criteria  | SESIP  | PSA  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Cloud  | Remote  | None  | Level 1  | EAL1 AVA_VAN.1  | 1  | 1  |  
| Edge  | Local  | None  | SW Level 2, HW Level 3  | EAL2 to 3, AVA_VAN.2  | 2 to 3  | 2 to 3  |  
| Lab  | Local  | Local  | SW Level 2, HW Level 3  | EAL2 to 3, AVA_VAN.2  | 2 to 3  | 2 to 3  |  
| Government  | Expert  | Expert  | SW Level 2, HW Level 4  | EAL4+ to 7, AVA_VAN.5  | 4 to 5  | n/a  |  
## Get In Touch
We can advise you on everything you need to know on post-quantum cryptography, and we’d be delighted to help, or discuss a partnership.

Cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient.

The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.

This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.

You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.

Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.

UltraPQ-Suite: Mature PQC in Software, FPGA and ASIC

An unparalleled range of IP for many use cases in your PQC migration… from the people who helped write the standards
.

Where we truly excel is with PQC that is Ultra Fast, Ultra Small, or Ultra Secure
Implementation matters. In fact, fundamentally changing the cryptography behind the scenes mean the way in which it’s implemented is becoming increasingly important. It’s even more acute at the extremes of optimizing for fast performance, high security, or low footprint.

PQShield’s deep knowledge (along with our patents, protocols and security techniques) enables us to move way beyond the competition and open source. We can deliver high-quality products to address these optimization problems head-on, allowing you, as a vendor, to reduce time-to-market, and helping you build PQC into greenfield and brownfield products.

PQMicroLib-Core

Highly optimizable baremetal PQC library in as little as 5kb RAM

PQMicroLib-Core is a CAVP-Ready version of PQShield’s CMVP-certified PQCryptoLib-Core, tailored specifically for embedded systems, small footprint solutions, and memory constrained devices. PQMicroLib-Core is an ultra-small library, designed with flexibility and configurability in mind.

MORE INFORMATION

PQCryptoLib-Core

Highly configurable SW PQC Library for Classical, PQC and PQ/T Hybrid on Linux, Windows and Mac

PQCryptoLib-Core is a FIPS 140-3 CMVP Certified / CAVP Compliant general-purpose cryptographic library, designed for a wide variety of applications, with cryptoagility in mind. Configurable by a secure API, PQCryptoLib-Core is optimized for the threat of harvest-now-decrypt-later attacks in a manageable, easy-to-integrate software solution.

MORE INFORMATION

PQCryptoLib-SDK

PQCryptoLib-Core + OpenSSL 3.x Provider for ease of integration

PQCryptoLib-SDK is a plug-and-play tool that helps to transition OpenSSL-based applications to quantum resilience, designed with prototyping and experimentation in mind. It supplies software implementations of PQC algorithms via an OpenSSL provider, including ML-DSA, Falcon, ML-KEM, and hybrid PQ/T schemes for TLS.

MORE INFORMATION

PQPlatform-CoPro

FIPS 140-3 CAVP compliant, compact hardware PQC acceleration 

PQPlatform-CoPro is a highly-flexible cryptographic coprocessor designed to add post-quantum capabilities to an existing security subsystem. It’s a powerful combination of cryptography engines, designed for performance, minimal integration effort and optimization with our world-class side-channel protection.

 

 

MORE INFORMATION

PQPlatform-TrustSys

PQC-first RoT with silicon-proven SCA resistance

Engineered for cryptographic implementation and agility, PQPlatform-TrustSys provides a complete, PQC-focused, Root-of-Trust security solution. With industry-leading, NIST-standardized post-quantum cryptography support (ML-KEM, ML-DSA), plus traditional ECC and RSA cryptographic algorithms, as well as fault-tolerance and side-channel countermeasures, PQPlatform-TrustSys is an ultra-secure solution for systems – before, during, and beyond the transition to PQC.

MORE INFORMATION

PQPerform-Flare

Up to 1M KeyEnc/sec with improved power efficiency 

PQPerform-Flare is a powerful hardware-based FIPS 140-3 CAVP-certified product, designed for high throughput and low latency PQC. It’s a self-contained, ultra-fast hardware product that adds PQC to network HSMs or other infrastructure components where high performance is required. PQPerform-Flare is optimized for TLS, as well as other use cases, and supports ML-DSA (FIPS 204) and ML-KEM (FIPS 203).

 

 

MORE INFORMATION

PQPerform-Inferno

Highly configurable hardware lattice PQC ultra acceleration in AXI4 and PCIe systems

PQPerform-Inferno is a powerful, scalable hardware solution that’s engineered for unparalleled performance. Building on the architecture of PQPerform-Flare, Inferno integrates multiple instances with intelligent load balancing to achieve breakthrough performance, capable of delivering over 1 million key encapsulations per second.

 

 

MORE INFORMATION

PQPerform-Flex

PQPerform-Inferno + RISC-V processor for enhanced cryptoagility

PQPerform-Flex is a powerful combination of PQPerform-Inferno with a RISC-V processor, providing a complete subsystem, ready for the changing cryptography needs of tomorrow. It supports a range of algorithms including HQC, one of NIST’s future candidates for standardization in 2027. PQPerform-Flex is focused on high-throughput with low latency.

 

 

MORE INFORMATION

 

Multi-level security profiles

As part of our commitment to security provision in different solutions of our products, we’ve developed 4 discrete security levels – Cloud Grade, Edge Grade, Lab Grade and Government Grade, which are aligned with NIST, Common Criteria, SESIP and PSA standards, as shown below. These levels are designed to be appropriate for different use cases, and are tested continuously by both PQShield and external labs for certification.

  • Different applications require different threat models
  • PQShield products in 4 security levels to address all use cases
  • Multiple papers currently published on SCA attacks and countermeasures for PQC. All our papers are available from our Publications section.

 

GradeSCAFIAFIPS 140-3 CMVPCommon CriteriaSESIPPSA
CloudRemoteNoneLevel 1EAL1 AVA_VAN.111
EdgeLocalNoneSW Level 2, HW Level 3EAL2 to 3, AVA_VAN.22 to 32 to 3
LabLocalLocalSW Level 2, HW Level 3EAL2 to 3, AVA_VAN.22 to 32 to 3
GovernmentExpertExpertSW Level 2, HW Level 4EAL4+ to 7, AVA_VAN.54 to 5n/a
